languages.text: Архимилитант Ведка Дунавски верно служила династии на протяжении десятков лет, воодушевляя бойцов Заркова своим примером. Каждая тяжелая рана, полученная ей, только закаляла ее характер — и добавляла железа в ее тело. Но Ведка встретила свою смерть не на поле боя, а на операционном столе во время имплантации очередного аугмента, призванного поддержать жизнь в истерзанном теле.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. But Vedka met her death not on the battlefield, but on the operating table during the implantation of another augment to keep her wrecked body alive.

Каждая тяжелая рана, полученная ей, только закаляла ее характер — и добавляла железа в ее тело. Но Ведка встретила свою смерть не на поле боя, а на операционном столе во время имплантации очередного аугмента, призванного поддержать жизнь в истерзанном теле.

Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. But Vedka met her death not on the battlefield, but on the operating table during the implantation of another augment to keep her wrecked body alive.

But Vedka met her death not on the battlefield, but on the operating table during the implantation of another augment to keep her wrecked body alive.

languages.text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、王朝に忠誠を誓い、数十年間戦い続けた。彼女の勇姿はザルコフの戦士たちに勇気を与えた。受けた重傷は彼女をさらに強くし、さらに鉄の体を作り上げた。しかし、ヴェドカは戦場でなく、手術台で命を落とした。彼女の壊れた体を維持するために、新たな強化を施す手術中だった。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. But Vedka met her death not on the battlefield, but on the operating table during the implantation of another augment to keep her wrecked body alive.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、王朝に忠誠を誓い、数十年間戦い続けた。彼女の勇姿はザルコフの戦士たちに勇気を与えた。受けた重傷は彼女をさらに強くし、さらに鉄の体を作り上げた。しかし、ヴェドカは戦場でなく、手術台で命を落とした。彼女の壊れた体を維持するために、新たな強化を施す手術中だった。

languages.text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡忠诚地为王朝服役数十年，以身作则激励着扎尔科夫的战士们。每一次重伤都让她愈发坚韧，也为她的身躯增添更多钢铁。不过薇德卡并没有倒在战场上，而是死于手术台——彼时，她正要安装一个植入物，以维系她那早已支离破碎的身体。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. But Vedka met her death not on the battlefield, but on the operating table during the implantation of another augment to keep her wrecked body alive.

traits.locale_text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡忠诚地为王朝服役数十年，以身作则激励着扎尔科夫的战士们。每一次重伤都让她愈发坚韧，也为她的身躯增添更多钢铁。不过薇德卡并没有倒在战场上，而是死于手术台——彼时，她正要安装一个植入物，以维系她那早已支离破碎的身体。

languages.text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski servit fidèlement la dynastie plusieurs décennies durant et devint un modèle pour les autres combattants de Zarkov. Les terribles blessures qu'elle subit ne firent que l'endurcir davantage, au sens propre comme au figuré, car chacune était l'occasion de renforcer son corps à l'aide de métal. Cependant, au lieu du champ de bataille, c'est sur une table d'opération que Vedka trouva la mort, pendant l'implantation d'un nouvel augmétique visant à garder son corps ravagé en vie.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. But Vedka met her death not on the battlefield, but on the operating table during the implantation of another augment to keep her wrecked body alive.

Les terribles blessures qu'elle subit ne firent que l'endurcir davantage, au sens propre comme au figuré, car chacune était l'occasion de renforcer son corps à l'aide de métal. Cependant, au lieu du champ de bataille, c'est sur une table d'opération que Vedka trouva la mort, pendant l'implantation d'un nouvel augmétique visant à garder son corps ravagé en vie.

languages.text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski sirvió a la dinastía con lealtad durante décadas, y su ejemplo inspiró a los guerreros de Zarkov. Cada grave herida que sufría solo servía para hacerla más fuerte... y añadir más hierro a su cuerpo. La muerte no encontró a Vedka en el campo de batalla, sino en la mesa de operaciones, durante la implantación de otro aumento para mantener vivo a su cuerpo destrozado.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. But Vedka met her death not on the battlefield, but on the operating table during the implantation of another augment to keep her wrecked body alive.

traits.locale_text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski sirvió a la dinastía con lealtad durante décadas, y su ejemplo inspiró a los guerreros de Zarkov. Cada grave herida que sufría solo servía para hacerla más fuerte... y añadir más hierro a su cuerpo. La muerte no encontró a Vedka en el campo de batalla, sino en la mesa de operaciones, durante la implantación de otro aumento para mantener vivo a su cuerpo destrozado.

languages.text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, onlarca yıl boyunca hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet etti ve Zarkov savaşçılarına ilham verdi. Aldığı her ağır yara onu daha da sertleştirmeye ve vücuduna daha fazla demir eklemeye yaradı. Ancak Vedka; ölümü savaş alanında değil, harap olmuş bedenini hayatta tutmak için başka bir ogmentin takılmakta olduğu ameliyat masasında karşıladı.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski served the dynasty faithfully for decades, inspiring the fighters of Zarkov by her example. Each grievous wound she received only served to toughen her further — and add more iron to her body. But Vedka met her death not on the battlefield, but on the operating table during the implantation of another augment to keep her wrecked body alive.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, onlarca yıl boyunca hanedanlığa sadakatle hizmet etti ve Zarkov savaşçılarına ilham verdi. Aldığı her ağır yara onu daha da sertleştirmeye ve vücuduna daha fazla demir eklemeye yaradı. Ancak Vedka; ölümü savaş alanında değil, harap olmuş bedenini hayatta tutmak için başka bir ogmentin takılmakta olduğu ameliyat masasında karşıladı.

languages.text: Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski war der Dynastie mehrere Jahrzehnte lang treu ergeben und inspirierte die Kämpfer von Zarkov mit ihrem Beispiel. Jede Wunde, die sie erlitt, machte sie nur noch härter ... und verstärkte ihren Körper mit zusätzlichem Eisen. Vedka starb allerdings nicht auf dem Schlachtfeld, sondern auf dem Operationstisch bei der Implantation einer weiteren Augmentation, die ihren geschundenen Körper am Leben halten sollte..

But Vedka met her death not on the battlefield, but on the operating table during the implantation of another augment to keep her wrecked body alive.
